text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: Neither web search returned any page with the exact title "Generative ai for de novo drug design: recent advances, challenges, and future directions" attributed to Xuegong Liu, Qing Song, Yu Wei, and Yun Xu in Drug Discovery Today (2023). The searches surfaced only differently titled papers by different authors on similar topics, and the paper was not found in any academic database.
LINK: NONE
